Students must adhere to all LEP Admissions policies outlined in the University's LEP Website (https://lep.umd.edu/).

Students who take an equivalent to CHEM134 must also have completed an equivalent to CHEM131 with a minimum grade of C-.

Additional Admissions Requirements In addition to the LEP admissions criteria, students applying to the Cyber- Physical Systems Engineering (CPSE) major must meet the following requirements:
